scope.en: One paragraph lifted from the plan's phasing section, describing what Phase A delivers and what 'done' looks like.
scope.fr: Un paragraphe repris de la section de phasage du plan, décrivant ce que livre la Phase A et à quoi ressemble « terminé ».

commits.message: feat(area): backend + tests for Phase A

deviations: List of intentional deviations from the plan that future readers should know about.
Each item is a short, specific statement — not a vague 'we tweaked X'.
phases.notesForLater: Anything Phase B (or later) should remember about how Phase A landed. Optional.

scope.en: Phase B scope summary, lifted from the plan.
scope.fr: Résumé du périmètre Phase B, repris du plan.

title.fr: TEST · F — Replay du chemin heureux

scope.en: End-to-end CLI-driven replay of the canonical scenario against the deployed surface. Fix bugs found, redeploy individual functions, iterate.
scope.fr: Replay bout-en-bout d'un scénario canonique piloté par le CLI contre la surface déployée. Corriger les bugs trouvés, redéployer les fonctions individuelles, itérer.

scope.en: Exercise every guard: auth, state, rate limits, token expiry. Each must produce the expected error code + mapped CLI exit code.
scope.fr: Exercer chaque garde : auth, état, rate limits, expiration de token. Chacun doit produire le code d'erreur attendu + code de sortie CLI mappé.

phases._comment: If one agent run ships both TEST-F and TEST-G, put runtime+tokens on TEST-F and set agent.sharedWith='TEST-F' on TEST-G so the summary table doesn't double-count. See SKILL.md, 'Tracking time + tokens + PRs on the roadmap'.
